name: Melt-in-Your-Mouth-Blueberry-Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Beat egg whites until stiff peaks form.
3. Gradually add in 1/4 cup of granulated sugar and continue beating.
4. In a separate bowl, cream margarine; gradually add salt, vanilla extract, and remaining sugar.
5. Add egg yolks and beat until creamy.
6. Sift flour and baking powder together.
7. Alternately add the dry ingredients to the creamed mixture with milk.
8. Gently fold in the beaten egg whites.
9. Coat blueberries with 1 tablespoon of flour; gently fold into the batter.
10. Pour batter into an 8x8 inch pan and sprinkle cinnamon sugar on top.
11. Bake for 50 minutes at 350°F.
12. Allow to cool on a rack before serving.
13. Wrap leftovers in foil and store in the refrigerator. The cake can also be frozen.
